title: notodanthonia racemosa
intro: Notodanthonia racemosa, also known as the prickly rice-flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Notodanthonia racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
